calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Vacated

MOTION FOR PAYMENT OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Payment Of Attorney'S Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses
Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (Via Zoom Conference)
Jordan Sannitolli, ESQ. of BICKEL SANNIPOLI APC Tel:(619) 374-4100 for plaintiff.
Kriston Guillot, ESQ. of BEATTY & MYERS, LLP Tel: (562) 606-1530 for defendant.
Court Reporter: Michelle Cooper CSR#13572 Tel: 562-279-5792 email: Mgraciano@elitesteno.com

Hearing is held. Defendant counsel contests the tentative ruling. Requesting for the court to consider a reasonable hourly rate for paralegal and attorneys fees. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiffs Calvin Jenn and Fusami Jenn's Motion For Payment Of Attorney's Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Court Reporter: Michelle Cooper CSR#13572 Tel: 562-279-5792 email: Mgraciano@elitesteno.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)

**AN ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PAYMENT OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS AND EXPENSES IS SIGNED AFTER THE HEARING. **

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Set For Trial On Jul-07-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
